name: Bacon 'n Eggs Crescent Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Bacon; crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Separate dough into 4 rectangles.
3. Place 2 rectangles in an ungreased 8-inch square pan; press over bottom and 1/2 inch up sides to form crust, sealing perforations.
4. Place cheese slices over dough.
5. Sprinkle bacon and onion evenly over the top.
6. Mix milk and eggs together.
7. Pour the mixture over the bacon.
8. Separate remaining dough into triangles.
9. Arrange triangles over the bacon-egg mixture; do not seal.
10. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and filling is set.
